_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: Conversely, after Rictor knockout, the mTORC2 pathway was blocked, and the expression levels of P-mTOR, Rictor, MAP2, and β3-Tubulin decreased significantly
details: After Rictor knockout, mTORC2 pathway was blocked and expression levels of P-mTOR, Rictor, MAP2, and β3-Tubulin decreased significantly
